user [179] · 2007-10-02
i personally love syamarani dd art works, of the krsnaart most of the art recreated by srila prababhupada'b4s artists whom he personally trained up too, be found living in vrndavan actually, is the best art i could posibly ashure that,.. !

like CC and all the donated pictures made to print by srila prabhupada bhaktivedanta book press, i agree there that are actually differnet tipe of styles when reproducing some pictures, specially the ones at CC are top top.

hare krsna !
